title: Paisa Note Song Lyrics
stanzas:
paisa note uththupaathen
gandhiyathaan kaanom
un mugamthaan theriyuthu
enna panna naanum

kovilukkul poi paathen
saamiyathaan kaanom
saami silai polirukkum
nee mattumthaan venum

enakku nee
mattumthaan venum
indhaadi paalu
pazham thaenum
karpooram yethuvandi naanum
nee venum enakku
ovvorunaalum

thaenu mittaai lippukku
thevaiyillai lipsticku
vennilavu eye-ukku
venaamadi Eyetex-u

thaarumaaru renge-la
vachirukken nenjula
vera level azhagula
paakurendi kannula

kadhal tholviya
paathavandi naanu
firstu lovvula
thoththavandi naanu

lovvukkaaga yengurendi naanu
ullangaiyila thaangiduven-nu
ada sathiyama solluren
yemmela sathiyama solluren
ummela sathiyama solluren
seekiram solli thola
vaaya yenda mellura

andha maari indha maari
unna maari yaarumilla
unna maari enna maari
jodi illa oorukkulla

vera maari aachupulla
ellaam maari pochu ulla
nee mattum thaan venum
vera yaarum thevai illa.

enakku nee
mattumthaan venum

karpooram yethuvandi naanum
nee venum enakku
ovvorunaalum

andha maari indha maari
unna maari yaarumilla
unna maari enna maari
jodi illa oorukkulla

vera maari aachupulla
ellaam maari pochu ulla
nee mattum thaan venum
vera yaarum thevai illa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Paisa Note'?

The song 'Paisa Note' explores themes of desire and attraction, using playful lyrics to convey the singer's feelings.

In which movie does 'Paisa Note' appear?

'Paisa Note' is featured in the movie Comali.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Paisa Note'?

The song is sung and composed by Hip Hop Tamizha.

When was 'Paisa Note' released?

'Paisa Note' was released on August 18, 2019.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Paisa Note' is an energetic track that captures the playful essence of attraction and desire. The vibrant beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere perfect for parties and celebrations. In the context of the movie Comali, the song adds a lively touch to the narrative, resonating with youthful exuberance. Overall, it evokes feelings of joy and excitement, making it a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paisa Note is a vibrant anthem that showcases the unique flair of Hip Hop Tamizha. With its infectious beats and catchy lyrics, this song is sure to get you moving. Dive into the energetic vibe that makes this track a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: I picked up the money note, and I can see your face; I don't know what to do.
I went to the temple, and I can see the god; you are the only one I want, just like the idol.
I only want you; I need milk, fruit, and camphor; I want you every day.
I don't need honey for the sweet; I don't need lipstick for the lips; I don't need Eyetex for the eyes.
I have placed the stars in my heart; my feelings are on another level, looking beautiful in my eyes.
I am the one who has faced love's rejection; I am the one who has been hurt in love.
I will stay in love; I promise that I will; I swear on you, I will say it quickly, don't keep your mouth shut.
Like that, like this, no one is like you; no one is like you in this town.
Everything else has changed; only you are needed; I don't need anyone else.
I picked up the money note, and I can see your face; I don't know what to do.

I only want you; I need milk, fruit, and camphor; I want you every day.
Like that, like this, no one is like you; no one is like you in this town.
Everything else has changed; only you are needed; I don't need anyone else.
